title: borbonia littoralis
intro: Borbonia littoralis, also known as the Coastal Borbonia, is a type of flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Borbonia littoralis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
